allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('memory/agente_toesca.db'\); cur=c.cursor\(\); cur.execute\(\\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\); [print\(r[0]\) for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('memory/agente_toesca.db'\); cur=c.cursor\(\); cur.execute\('SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=\\"table\\"'\); tables=[r[0] for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]; print\(tables\); [print\(t, cur.execute\(f'SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM {t}'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\) for t in tables]")
